headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' https://open.spotify.com https://sdk.scdn.co; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https://picsum.photos https://i.scdn.co https://mosaic.scdn.co; connect-src 'self' https://api.spotify.com; frame-src https://open.spotify.com; frame-ancestors 'none'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self';
